content.hint: 表达愿意继续提供帮助，体现专业与关怀

blanks.answer: If you have any other questions, don't hesitate to reach out.
options: I hope you have a nice day.
If you have any other questions, don't hesitate to reach out.

content.situation: 你刚帮助一位客户解决了关于产品退货的疑问，对方表示感谢，你需要礼貌结束对话并表达祝福。
content.speakerText: Thank you so much for your help—I feel much more confident now!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你的帮助，我现在更有信心了！
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌结束对话 + 主动提供后续支持

content.hint: 表达支持的常用动词短语，常用于鼓励他人
content.template: You’re welcome! Good luck with your application—I’m ___ for you!
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：be rooting for someone（支持某人）
